main1.jpg.caption:
Unleash iconic performance with the Walther PPK in Stainless, a .380 ACP concealed carry pistol featuring a 6-round capacity, crafted for precision and reliability. This legendary handgun delivers proven results in critical moments, showcasing Walther’s innovative heritage for shooters who demand excellence in a compact design.

The Walther PPK Stainless set a new standard over 80 years ago, creating the concealed carry pistol category. Chambered in .380 ACP with a 6-round capacity, this pistol combines potent firepower with concealable size, offering a practical and dependable solution for undercover officers and personal defense users seeking superior functionality.

Featuring a double-action/single-action trigger, the Walther PPK in Stainless decocks when the safety is lowered, a revolutionary feature introduced by Walther. This advanced design integrates the best technologies of its time, delivering a performance-driven pistol that continues to define reliability and ease of use for concealed carry applications.

The Walther PPK Stainless remains a timeless classic, renowned for its elegant design and exceptional engineering. With a 6-round capacity and durable stainless finish, this pistol is among the most coveted concealed carry firearms, embodying Walther’s legacy of excellence and unparalleled performance for modern shooters.
